ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., regular, petite, plus) */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size of the apparel */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size of the apparel */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size of the apparel */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "pant_size" TEXT /* Pant size (e.g., 26, 28) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Tops, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "style_number" TEXT /* Style number of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric type of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the brand */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency preference of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement of the user */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the user */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement of the user */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the user */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "preferred_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred size chart */,
  "favored_brands" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favored brands */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product or size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product or size chart was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to access the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("chart_id")
)
